---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for wiki-weaver
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or motivation

What problem does this feature solve? What is missing or painful today?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen. If you have a concrete design idea,
describe it here.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you considered and why you think they are inferior.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, papers, prior art, or examples that informed the request.
